Meta.siteTitle: Villa Maria Steakhouse — Argentinian grill in Amsterdam
Meta.siteDescription: Argentinian steakhouse near Leidseplein. Charcoal-grilled steaks, spare ribs, fish. Daily 12:00 – 23:00.

Footer.tagline: Argentinian grill, Amsterdam — the parrilla, the fire, the cut.

Hero.title: Open charcoal.
Hero.subtitle: An Argentinian grill on Lange Leidsedwarsstraat — five minutes from Leidseplein.
Hero.imageAlt: Steaks, ribs and shrimp on the charcoal grill at Villa Maria

Intro.p1: Selim, the owner, fell in love with Argentinian food walking Buenos Aires at night — meeting grill smoke at every corner.
Intro.p2: Villa Maria runs the same way. Charcoal first. The best cuts selected each morning. A chef who knows the fire.
Intro.p3: Pure, smoky, juicy — five minutes from Leidseplein.

MenuPreview.title: Six from the parrilla.
MenuPreview.subtitle: Pick the weight at the table. The rest is on the menu.
MenuPreview.signaturePhotoCaption: Bife with grilled tomato, salad, fries.

TheRoom.title: Cowhide booths and arched red walls.
TheRoom.p: A small Amsterdam corner that smells of charcoal by noon. In summer the terrace spills onto Lange Leidsedwarsstraat. Two cuts down from Leidseplein.

GroupDining.title: Eight to forty around one fire.
GroupDining.p: Tables for groups can be booked by phone. Whole-room buyouts on quiet evenings, by arrangement.

Location.title: Lange Leidsedwarsstraat 45
Location.p1: Five minutes on foot from Leidseplein.
Location.mapTitle: Map showing Villa Maria Steakhouse at Lange Leidsedwarsstraat 45, Amsterdam
